overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit urban alleyway in Night City, following NPCs with glowing umbrellas, interacting with a street vendor, and entering a ramen shop. The environment features heavy Asian-inspired cyberpunk aesthetics with wet reflective streets and prominent Tyger Claws gang signage.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian walkway dominated by a large Tyger Claws gang sign with Japanese characters. The player follows two characters holding glowing green and red umbrellas as they walk toward an open plaza visible in the distance, transitioning from sheltered cover to open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley between high-rise buildings with neon signage

events.description: turns right from open plaza into narrow alleyway following purple umbrella character
narrows focus to follow the purple umbrella deeper into the alley

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza and turning into a narrow alleyway to follow a character with a purple glowing umbrella

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens briefly into a plaza with massive digital billboards before turning right into a narrow alley. The player follows a character with a distinctive purple glowing umbrella between tall buildings covered in neon advertisements and trash debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with street vendor stalls and wet reflective pavement

events.description: pauses briefly at street vendor stall to look at merchandise
resumes walking down the alley past illuminated benches

character with purple glowing umbrella continuing down the alley ahead

arcade-style vending machine with colorful glowing screens

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the wet reflective alley, the player approaches a street vendor stall with boxes of merchandise on the left. After briefly pausing to look at the goods, the player continues past a glowing blue neon bench and arcade machines, with the purple umbrella character visible further ahead and a ramen shop entrance appearing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: small ramen shop interior with counter seating and neon decor

events.description: enters indoor ramen shop from the alleyway

shop worker behind counter preparing food with steam rising from cooking equipment

entered.detail: wooden counter with stools and food preparation area with various condiments

glass case with steam and displayed food items including dumplings
industrial ceiling fans with exposed wiring and ductwork

segments.scene_description: The player enters the ramen shop from the alley, transitioning to a dimly lit interior dominated by pink and green neon signage. Inside, a customer sits at the counter eating while steam rises from the cooking area behind the counter, with industrial ceiling fans visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley continuing past arcade machines and neon storefronts

events.description: exits ramen shop back into the narrow alleyway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the ramen shop back into the alley, the player continues walking past the shop's exterior facade with its striped awning. The alley continues with more neon storefronts including arcade machines on the left and various commercial signs, with the wet pavement reflecting the colorful lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian walkway through a neon-drenched alleyway and into a small eatery. It begins under a large Tyger Claws gang sign, following characters with glowing green and red umbrellas as the camera moves from the covered path into an open plaza filled with massive digital billboards. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts into a narrow, wet alley where the player follows a purple glowing umbrella past piles of debris and a street vendor's merchandise. The movement continues past glowing blue benches and arcade machines before transitioning from the reflective outdoor pavement into the dimly lit interior of a ramen shop, characterized by rising steam and pink and green neon lights. Finally, the camera exits the shop back into the colorful alley, passing a striped awning and further neon storefronts that shimmer on the damp ground.
